title: xanthophytum involucratum
intro: Xanthophytum involucratum, also known as yellow ginger, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Malaysia and Indonesia, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xanthophytum involucratum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Xanthophytum involucratum include extracts, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
